title: 2025 Predictions with bestie Gavin Baker
description:
(0:00) The Besties welcome Gavin Baker and recap ski week!

(5:38) Biggest Political Winner

(9:26) Biggest Political Loser

(17:34) Biggest Business Winner

(32:43) Biggest Business Loser

(46:54) Biggest Business Deal

(57:04) Most Contrarian Belief

(1:12:59) Best Performing Asset

(1:22:56) Worst Performing Asset

(1:30:19) Most Anticipated Trend

(1:38:59) Most Anticipated Media

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses their 2025 predictions with guest Gavin Baker, covering various topics such as biggest political and business winners and losers, best performing assets, and most anticipated trends. They also share their super predictions and discuss drones, UFOs, and more. The episode includes a recap of their ski week and features the hosts' insights on the current state of the world.

takeaways.text: Drones and UFOs will be a major topic

sentiment.notes: The hosts seem excited about the future and share their positive predictions for 2025. They also discuss some potential challenges, but overall the tone is optimistic.
